overview: I built a PM Knowledge Assistant using Claude and ChromaDB, implementing a full RAG pipeline with retrieval quality techniques. RAG grounded Claude's answers to my actual Q3 data (e.g., 2.3% lift) vs.

keyPoints.title: Cosine similarity: A vs B 0.412, A vs C 0.144 — zero keyword overlap
RAG cited specific 2.3% Q3 lift; no-RAG gave generic 5–15% benchmarks
Re-ranking with Haiku correctly pruned irrelevant chunks across queries
Claude still hallucinates without explicit system prompt guardrails
